title: monetia paleacea
intro: Monetia paleacea is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Sri Lanka. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Monetia paleacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and act as an antiseptic to treat wounds. Monetia paleacea is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat various health conditions, and is also used in traditional medicine in Sri Lanka.
